title: lathyrus purpureus
intro: Lathyrus purpureus, also known as the purple pea or hairy vetchling, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It is native to Europe and Western Asia, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus purpureus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. Lathyrus purpureus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, with the dried flowers, leaves, and stems being used to make these preparations.
